babyDevelopment: Congratulations! Your baby is considered 'Early Term'. They are perfectly capable of surviving outside. They're practicing breathing and sucking reflex.
bodyChanges: You might lose your 'mucus plug' (bloody show), a sign the cervix is softening and opening. Effacement and dilation might begin.
tips: Know exactly who to call when labor starts
Try labor-inducing techniques if cleared by your doctor

dont: Assume every contraction is real labor
Stress if nothing is happening yet

warningSignsToWatch: True labor contractions (5 mins apart, lasting 1 min, for 1 hour)
milestoneDescription: Baby is officially early term and developmentally ready to be born!
